text: I thought going back to the gym would be a victory, but it's been a humbling experience. My body hurts, but it's a reminder that sacrifice is a part of chasing dreams. Every rep is a step closer to my goals.
decision_reason: uses a relatable storyline to convey the importance of sacrifice in chasing dreams

text: It's okay to not be okay, especially when you're trying to get back on track. I'm struggling to fix my sleep schedule and it's affecting my gym progress, but I see others pushing through similar struggles and it gives me hope.

audience_fit.desire: belonging to a group that gets it

decision_reason: uses empathy to connect with the audience and highlights the importance of community in overcoming struggles
